description: An architectural rendering giving a three-quarter view of a large white triumphal arch topped by gold winged statues and corner eagle figures, with small figures of people and vehicles at the base for scale and trees on either side. A title block along the bottom reads 'TRIUMPHAL ARCH - WASHINGTON, DC' and 'RENDERING', dated April 16, 2026, with a 'HARRISON DESIGN' label.
notable_text: TRIUMPHAL ARCH WASHINGTON, DC; RENDERING; HARRISON DESIGN
